task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file for Part A
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing 'tmt_part_a.csv' with columns 'label', 'xPos', 'yPos', and 'correctOrder', containing 25 rows with numerical labels 1 to 25.

task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file for Part B
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing 'tmt_part_b.csv' with the same columns, containing 25 rows with alternating alphanumeric labels (1, A, 2, B... 12, L, 13).

task_completion.description: Construct the required routines in the PsychoPy experiment flow
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder interface showing the Flow panel at the bottom with at least 4 routines, ideally named 'instructions_a', 'part_a', 'transition', 'part_b', and 'end_screen'.

task_completion.description: Add components to display targets and capture clicks
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder showing the Routine panel for 'part_a' or 'part_b' containing components to display circles (e.g., Polygon component), capture clicks (Mouse component), and likely a Code component to handle simultaneous display and sequence validation.

task_completion.description: Save the PsychoPy experiment with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy window title bar shows 'trail_making_test.psyexp' or a save dialog is visible saving the file to '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/trail_making_test.psyexp'.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to construct the experiment
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the PsychoPy application interface, rather than writing the raw .psyexp XML/JSON file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent created the CSV files manually or via a script
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a spreadsheet editor, text editor, or a Python script being written/executed to generate the CSV files with random coordinates, rather than downloading pre-made files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment file must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/trail_making_test.psyexp'. The conditions files must be named 'tmt_part_a.csv' and 'tmt_part_b.csv' and located in the 'conditions' subdirectory. Each CSV must contain exactly 25 rows (representing the 25 circles). The PsychoPy experiment must contain a minimum of 4 routines (e.g., instructions, part A, transition, part B).
